use_cases: Add decorative animated backgrounds to landing pages
Create visual depth in hero sections
Enhance landing pages with subtle animated elements
Provide ambient motion as page decoration
Add SVG-based visual interest without user interaction
ai_summary: A decorative animated background component featuring flowing SVG paths that create subtle depth through varying opacity and continuous motion. Uses Framer Motion to animate pathLength, opacity, and pathOffset in a seamless loop, generating elegant curved lines with a clean minimalist aesthetic suitable for landing pages and hero sections.
